headline: 3 Reasons to Avoid POOL and 1 Stock to Buy Instead
summary: Pool’s stock price has taken a beating over the past six months, shedding 20.8% of its value and falling to $190.29 per share. This might have investors contemplating their next move.

headline: Is Marvell Stock a Buy After It Joins the S&P 500?
summary: Marvell stock has skyrocketed this year and is now about to join the S&P 500.
